import subprocess
r = subprocess.run(["tasklist"], capture_output=True, text=True)
has_miner = "miner" in r.stdout.lower()
r2 = subprocess.run(["nvidia-smi", "--query-gpu=utilization.gpu", "--format=csv,noheader,nounits"], capture_output=True, text=True)
gpu = r2.stdout.strip() if r2.stdout else "?"
result = f"MINER:{'YES' if has_miner else 'NO'} GPU:{gpu}%"
